positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a majestic, mythical phoenix rising from stylized geometric smoke. The phoenix should have vibrant, elegant plumage with deep crimson, burnt orange, and gold accents. It is captured in a powerful ascent, with strong, defined curves forming a central, dynamic silhouette. The background should be composed of abstract, deep indigo and charcoal smoke wisps, providing high contrast against the brightly colored bird. Style: Modern linocut meets vaporwave aesthetic. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting emphasizing the feather edges and giving a glowing, ethereal quality. Composition: Perfectly centered, highly symmetrical, suitable for repeating pattern or single-color transfer. Print-friendly details: Solid color areas, strong vector lines, no gradients that blend indistinctly, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, noise, low detail, complex background, messy, gradient blend, photorealism
